heading: About Me
bio: Full Stack Developer with almost 3 years of professional experience specializing in React, Next.js, Node.js, TypeScript, PostgreSQL, and MongoDB.
paragraphs: Experienced in building and maintaining production web applications, real-time systems, e-commerce platforms, admin dashboards, and internal business portals.

Currently working for a fuel company where I maintain and enhance internal web portals used across multiple departments. I am passionate about creating scalable applications, solving business problems, and delivering clean user experiences.
Prior to my current role, I worked at Xurpas Inc. as a Junior Full Stack Developer where I contributed to multiple products including MetaCare, MemaChat, Playfriends, Food Truck, and Globe Website.
